features.description: Canonical path encoding module with sanitization (src/path_encoding.rs); sanitize_path_component rejects empty/./.. components explicitly

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub fn encode_path_component' src/path_encoding.rs && grep -c 'pub fn sanitize_path_component' src/path_encoding.rs && grep -c 'pub mod path_encoding' src/lib.rs
layers.fail_message: path_encoding.rs missing encode_path_component, sanitize_path_component, or lib.rs module declaration

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding path_encoding module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test path_encoding 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure function module with no runtime behavior -- fully covered by unit tests

features.description: disable_cert_verification uses HTTP fallback instead of broken env var approach

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Broken AWS_CA_BUNDLE env var approach still present in s3.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test disable_cert_verification 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: S3Client construction change -- runtime behavior requires real S3 endpoint with disable_cert_verification=true which is a dev/test-only config; covered by behavioral tests

features.description: Hermetic S3 unit tests: cargo test --locked --offline passes in full (5 sync tests use mock_s3_fields, 3 async tests marked #[ignore])

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: mock_s3_fields not found or 3 async tests not marked #[ignore]

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Test compilation errors after mock_s3_client change

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: cargo test --locked --offline does not pass in full after hermetic test fix

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Test infrastructure change -- no runtime binary behavior affected

features.description: s3.disable_ssl config field wired into S3Client construction (forces http:// endpoint)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test disable_ssl 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: S3Client construction change -- runtime behavior requires S3 endpoint with disable_ssl=true which is a dev/test config; covered by behavioral tests

features.description: check_parts_columns returns error when inconsistencies found (strict-fail instead of warn+continue)

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Old 'proceeding anyway' message still present -- strict-fail not implemented

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test check_parts_columns 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: check_parts_columns defaults to false; strict-fail only triggers with explicit config and real ClickHouse. Covered by unit tests with mock inconsistencies

features.description: --env flag accepts env-style keys (S3_BUCKET=val) in addition to dot-notation (s3.bucket=val)

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: env_key_to_dot_notation function not found in config.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test env_key_to_dot_notation 2>&1 | grep -E 'test result:' | head -1

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Config parsing change -- no runtime binary behavior; covered by unit tests that exercise apply_cli_env_overrides with env-style keys

features.description: All 4 url_encode implementations replaced by single path_encoding module; path traversal uses Path::components() Normal-only filter in download metadata write

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -rn 'fn url_encode' src/ | grep -v 'path_encoding' | grep -vc '//' || echo 0
layers.fail_message: Old url_encode function definitions still present in src/ (outside path_encoding.rs)

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure refactoring of string encoding functions -- identical output for all non-adversarial inputs. Path traversal sanitization tested via unit tests in path_encoding module

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules; docs/design.md updated for --env env-style keys and disable_cert_verification HTTP semantics

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/download src/upload src/restore src/storage; do test -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "MISSING: $m/CLAUDE.md"; done && grep -q 'env-style' docs/design.md && grep -q 'disable_cert_verification' docs/design.md && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing, or docs/design.md not updated for --env/disable_cert_verification

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/download src/upload src/restore src/storage; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "FAIL: $m"; done && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections (Parent Context, Directory Structure, Key Patterns, Parent Rules)

alternative_verification.command: for m in src/backup src/download src/upload src/restore src/storage; do test -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" && echo ok; done | wc -l | tr -d ' '
